Title: Botanical Floral Bouquet Crewneck T-Shirt Design
Description:
Celebrate the timeless beauty of nature with this elegant botanical floral bouquet design. Featuring delicate illustrations of lavender, ferns, and other lush green foliage, this artwork brings a subtle touch of organic sophistication to any outfit.

This charming, nature-inspired graphic is perfect for anyone who loves botany, wildflowers, cottagecore aesthetics, or simple, artistic designs. It makes an excellent gift for plant lovers, gardeners, or nature enthusiasts.

The print is applied to a comfortable, premium quality tee, offering a soft feel and lasting comfort for everyday wear. Whether you are attending a casual outdoor event, a farmers market, or simply enjoying a weekend stroll, this shirt is a tasteful and comfortable choice.

  • Style: Rustic, Bohemian, Floral, Botanical
  • Material: Soft-touch, breathable cotton blend (Note: Material details depend on specific product listing)
  • Ideal Use: Casual wear, gifts for nature lovers, spring and summer outfits.
